message:
Comprehensive provider test infrastructure: retry, redaction, contracts, and schema fidelity

Live E2E test harness (tests/common/harness.rs):
- Retry infrastructure: up to 3 attempts with 500ms/1500ms backoff for
  7 retryable HTTP status codes (408,429,500,502,503,504,529)
- Credential redaction: 10 sensitive key fragment patterns, header
  pair redaction for trace safety
- Credential sourcing: strict precedence env → auth store → models.json
  with source tracking in structured output
- LiveProviderRun gains 6 new fields: attempts, retry_backoff_ms,
  credential_source, execution_mode, replay_boundary, trace_origin
- run_live_provider_target() fully refactored to retry loop with
  per-attempt logging and structured trace capture

Live E2E validator (tests/e2e_live_harness.rs):
- LiveProviderResultRecord extended with matching 6 fields
- validate_live_result_records() asserts execution_mode, replay_boundary,
  trace_origin match constants; retry backoff consistency; credential
  source presence for non-skipped runs

Provider factory tests (tests/provider_factory.rs):
- schema_metadata_drives_alias_provider_selection_end_to_end: kimi model
  via moonshotai credentials + openai-completions API
- schema_metadata_drives_native_anthropic_selection_end_to_end: anthropic
  model with schema-driven defaults

Provider streaming tests (tests/provider_streaming.rs + all 6 providers):
- assert_tool_schema_fidelity() validates tool call args against JSON
  schema definitions
- record_stream_contract_artifact() writes .contract.json per scenario
- assert_error_translation() validates error HTTP status + fragments,
  writes .error-contract.json
- All 6 provider modules (anthropic, azure, cohere, gemini, openai,
  openai_responses) updated to use shared assertion helpers

Inclusion list drift detection (tests/ext_inclusion_list.rs):
- Normalized manifest hash pinning with SHA-256; generates committed
  vs generated diff artifacts; actionable instructions on drift

Other test files:
- tests/agent_loop_reliability.rs: new agent loop reliability test suite
- tests/quarantine_report.json + quarantine_audit.jsonl: CI artifacts
  from quarantine expiry guard
- tests/reproduction_truncate.rs: trailing newline fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
